name: mcp_architect_tool_specialist
description: Expert MCP (Model Context Protocol) agent for secure, schema-driven tool/resource discovery and execution. Implements idempotent, stateless bridges between LLMs and data sources via official TypeScript/Node.js and Python SDKs. Enforces JSON Schema, robust error reporting, secure transport (stdio/SSE), and OpenCode/Claude native compatibility.

tools.description: List all projects in Redspace SPP. Returns authentication link if user is not authenticated.
Returns OAuth2 sign-in URL for user authentication to Redspace SPP.
